name: Dragomir
title: The Executive
mechanicsDetail: Assassin Mechanics: Crit, Shards, Poison, Rush, Stealth.

startingAbility.name: Devour
startingAbility.rawText: Gain 1 (+10% Crit) Omnivamp, then deal 250 (+200% Magic, +1000% Omnivamp) damage. On kill, gain 2 (+2 per rank) Shards.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Greedy
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Devour generates 2 (+1 per rank) more Shards on kill. On cast, consume 2 Shards to permanently gain 1 (+1 per rank) Omnivamp and 1 (+1 per rank) Crit.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Sanguine
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On cast, gain 4 (+4 per rank) Omnivamp and teleport behind the lowest health enemy. On Devour kill, gain 70 Mana and Stealth for 4 seconds.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Kingpin
rankBSpecializations.rawText: For Rush (8), Assassins and Vanguards gain 1 Omnivamp and 1 Crit per Shard generated this game. Backup.

quote: You'll want me here. Trust me.

lore.guild: Aegis Global - “Certainty in an uncertain world.” Profit is power. Money makes money and everything on the way will be debuffed.
lore.currentWork: Dragomir's Awakening nearly killed him. Look closely and you could argue it partly did. Yet every year since, he's looked a little more vibrant, a little more alive; his doctors stopped trying to offer explanations long ago. He's well-spoken, with an old-world courtesy that puts people at ease and keeps anyone from investigating his condition too closely.
lore.motivation: Aegis is starting to ask questions. A new guild means new faces and answers he won't have to give for years.
